name: side-business-desktop
description: 侧方运营管理系统 - 桌面版 (SQLite + pkg + NSIS)

scripts.build:exe: npm run build && pkg . --targets node18-win-x64 --output build/payload/side-business.exe
scripts.copy:frontend: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');function cp(s,d){if(!fs.existsSync(s))return;fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});for(const e of fs.readdirSync(s)){const a=p.join(s,e),b=p.join(d,e);fs.statSync(a).isDirectory()?cp(a,b):fs.copyFileSync(a,b)}}cp('../client/dist','client-dist');console.log('Frontend copied')"
scripts.build:full: npm run build:frontend && npm run copy:frontend && npm run build && npm run build:exe
